instance_types.name: HR Only - Working from Abroad Request
Datadog/Dynatrace - request to extend scope of use

custom_fields.name: Please select which form requires processing
Please select what type of approval this is regarding
Who is the customer? Please give an idea of who the data controller would be and under which contract if known.
Give a title / brief description to the request
If this is an RFC please tick if any of the following apply
Has the product had a previous name
Has this partner had any previous products assured
Please tick the appropriate boxes in relation to risk
What Date and Estimated time is this required for?

priorities.name: High
priorities.description: Serious problem that could block progress.

priorities.name: Medium
priorities.description: Has the potential to affect progress.

priorities.name: Low
priorities.description: Minor problem or easily worked around.

priorities.name: Lowest
priorities.description: Trivial problem with little or no impact on progress.

roles.name: Agent
roles.description: Agents are part of the team. They can create and edit requests, and communicate with customers.

roles.name: atlassian-addons-project-access
roles.description: A project role that represents Connect add-ons declaring a scope that requires more than read issue permissions

actors.name: Agile Estimation & Planning - Affinity Sizing for Jira
BigPicture - Portfolio & Resource Management for Jira
Hiptest - BDD & Test Management for Jira
Status & Progress Report, Sum Up Dashboard Gadget for Jira
Swanly: Portfolio Roadmaps Structure Gantt, Release Timeline
Top Power BI Connector for Jira Cloud DEV

roles.name: Administrator
roles.description: Admins can do most things, like update settings and add other admins.

roles.name: Global Agent - No notifications
roles.description: Role designed for global agent access for any activity in the InfoSec SOC but not to receive any of the notifications.

roles.name: Viewer
roles.description: Viewers can search through, view, and comment on your team's work, but not much else.

request_types.name: Cyberfort Request
request_types.description: This is used for Cyberfort to raise requests

request_types.name: Report an incident
request_types.description: This is only for the Hybrid SOC, not to be used by anyone within EMIS.
request_types.help_text: To raise an internal Security Incident Report, please so to https://emisgroup.sharepoint.com/sites/GroupSecurity3/SitePages/Raise-A-Security-Incident.aspx

request_types.name: Report, Export or Dashboard Request
request_types.description: Put in a request for a services across our security platform
request_types.help_text: Use this request if you would like a custom report generating in the toolsets

request_types.name: Request access to Security tools
request_types.description: Request access to one of the Security Team tools.
request_types.help_text: For requesting access to tools such as DarkTrace, Tenable or Crowstrike

request_types.name: Request Device Isolation
request_types.description: This request is used to highlight a machine that needs to be isolated from the network.

request_types.name: Request Security Team approval
request_types.description: Use this option when you require the Security Team to approve something you would like to do e.g. Whitelist email (Darktrace Antigena), Application approval, CrowdStrike exclusions etc

request_types.name: Threat  Indicator
request_types.description: Threat indicator (IP, domain, URL, file hash) requiring tracking and action

request_types.name: Vulnerability
request_types.description: CVE vulnerability requiring management and tracking

request_types.name: Email request
request_types.description: Request received from your email support channel.

queues.name: Priority Issues
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND (priority in (Highest, High) AND status not in (Done, Resolved, Cancelled, Canceled) OR status = Reopened)

queues.name: Daily Review #0 - Vulnerability Notifications
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND status != Done AND status != Cancelled AND status != Canceled AND (reporter = qm:5f539475-12bc-4a9b-8eb4-f93ebc83dedf:536bcc8f-be11-43ee-b6d7-4409f1312d4c OR summary ~ Tipper OR summary ~ "EMIS Threat Intelligence Brief" OR summary ~ "Weekly Cyber Security Bulletin")

queues.name: Daily Review #1 - Unassigned Priority Queue >24h
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND priority in (High, Highest) AND assignee = EMPTY AND status not in (Done, Cancelled, Canceled) AND createdDate < startOfDay()

queues.name: Daily Review #2 - Unassigned non-priority > 5 days
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND priority not in (High, Highest) AND assignee = EMPTY AND status not in (Cancelled, Canceled, Done) AND createdDate <= -5d

queues.name: Daily Review #3 - Referred over > 14 days
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND status = Referred AND statusCategoryChangedDate < -14d AND updatedDate < -5d

queues.name: Daily Review #4 - Assigned in status New
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND assignee != EMPTY AND status = New

queues.name: Daily Review #5 - Not updated for 5 days
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND project in (10414) AND updated <= -5d AND status != Done AND status != Canceled AND priority in (High, Highest) AND assignee != EMPTY

queues.name: Weekly Review #1 - Tickets older than 7 days
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND status not in (Done, Cancelled, Canceled) AND createdDate <= -7d

queues.name: Rapid7 Alerts
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND summary ~ "Rapid7*" AND statusCategory in (2, 4)

queues.name: Tenable Vulnerability Alerts
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in (2, 4) AND reporter in (qm:5f539475-12bc-4a9b-8eb4-f93ebc83dedf:032e1411-eece-4920-96e6-7c807f6f3e3b)

queues.name: 📖 All open
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in ("To Do", "In Progress") ORDER BY "Time to done" ASC

queues.name: ⏰ Logged last 24 Hrs
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in (2, 4) AND created >= -1d

queues.name: Abbie - All Open
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in ("To Do", "In Progress") AND assignee = 63edf8a6d4dc4e35db112e37

queues.name: Achraf - All Open
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in ("To Do", "In Progress") AND assignee = 712020:421526ce-4b68-448e-9035-022fcc1571d7

queues.name: Hemal - All Open
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in ("To Do", "In Progress") AND assignee in (712020:258735a3-5ba5-411d-935c-c813c2dc938a, currentUser())

queues.name: David - All Open
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in ("To Do", "In Progress") AND assignee in (712020:1b63055e-8b87-43dc-b8e2-81b86ba75b57, 712020:0c09e130-ca84-4b18-840d-9268af3e52bc)

queues.name: Sam - All Open
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in ("To Do", "In Progress") AND assignee = 712020:b8dff76c-8ffb-4ba4-86cf-a6fef08f7139

queues.name: Ali - All Open
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in ("To Do", "In Progress") AND assignee = 712020:8c1d50fa-f725-4aac-96b6-ac4fcd7084e2

queues.name: Sid - All Open
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in ("To Do", "In Progress") AND assignee = 712020:fecdaf74-a3ba-41e1-b89a-4964fa478df3

queues.name: Johann - All Open
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in ("To Do", "In Progress") AND assignee = 5fc51289aa1d30006f44ffd9

queues.name: Amit - All Open
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in ("To Do", "In Progress") AND assignee = 5c66b2e4a56f82446eff5e39

queues.name: 🏁 All closed DLP
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND summary ~ DLP AND statusCategory = 3 ORDER BY cf[10276] DESC

queues.name: Change
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in ("To Do", "In Progress") AND issuetype in ("Request a change") ORDER BY "Time to done" ASC

queues.name: 🏁 All closed - Crowdstrike previous month (date range needs edited each month)
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND reporter in (qm:5f539475-12bc-4a9b-8eb4-f93ebc83dedf:b4de7cd4-7bc6-4047-84b1-1e99f1c71184) AND statusCategory = 3 ORDER BY cf[10276] DESC

queues.name: Phishing
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND "Request participants" in ("phishing@emishealth.com") AND statusCategory in ("To Do", "In Progress")

queues.name: Problem
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in ("To Do", "In Progress") AND issuetype in (Problem) ORDER BY "Time to done" ASC

queues.name: 📧 AGE Email requests
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND summary ~ AGE AND issuetype in standardIssueTypes() AND statusCategory in (2, 4)

queues.name: 🆕 Unassigned tickets
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in ("To Do", "In Progress") AND assignee is EMPTY ORDER BY "Time to done" ASC

queues.name: ❗ Incidents
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in ("To Do", "In Progress") AND issuetype in ("Report an incident") ORDER BY "Time to done" ASC

queues.name: 🔁 Reopened tickets
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND status = Reopened AND statusCategory = 2

queues.name: 🕵🏻‍♂️ Assigned to me
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in ("To Do", "In Progress") AND assignee = currentUser() ORDER BY "Time to done" ASC

queues.name: 🧵 SIEM Alerts
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in (2, 4) AND reporter in (qm:5f539475-12bc-4a9b-8eb4-f93ebc83dedf:7d11119e-eb87-4956-a2f2-31422249dcc9)

queues.name: 📧 Suspect Email
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in (2, 4) AND creator != "noreply@emisgroupplc.com" AND creator != "platform@cybelangel.net" AND creator != "falcon@crowdstrike.com" AND creator != "alerts@zscaler.com" AND creator != "infosec@emisgroupplc.com" AND creator != "Gareth.Winston@emisgroupplc.com" AND creator != "Carl.Bowman@emisgroupplc.com" AND creator != "csoc@arcturussecurity.com" AND creator != qm:5f539475-12bc-4a9b-8eb4-f93ebc83dedf:d8d20f2c-9519-41ee-b965-9a7d67e7e0f5 AND creator != qm:5f539475-12bc-4a9b-8eb4-f93ebc83dedf:17d9fd1c-9d51-4d2b-a7cb-e71e331c5070 AND creator != qm:5f539475-12bc-4a9b-8eb4-f93ebc83dedf:98fe5fd4-8cee-4178-ae24-8dd7f55bd4a9 AND creator != qm:5f539475-12bc-4a9b-8eb4-f93ebc83dedf:16992c1e-62d0-4141-a4af-d8c0a0a8e32d AND "SOC categorization" = "Alert - Suspect Email"

queues.name: 🌐 Zscaler Alerts
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in (2, 4) AND "SOC categorization" = "Alert - Zscaler"

queues.name: 💬 Requests
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND issuetype in ("Request Security Team approval", "Request Tenable (Vulnerability Management) report", "Request access to Security tools") AND statusCategory in (2, 4) ORDER BY "Time to done" ASC

queues.name: 🏁 All closed
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory = 3 ORDER BY cf[10276] DESC

queues.name: 🔎  SaaS DLP
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND summary ~ EMIS-Darktrace AND description ~ "M365 DLP Rule Match " AND statusCategory in (2, 4) AND "Purple Testing" = No ORDER BY created DESC

queues.name: NHS/D Notifications
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND statusCategory in (2, 4) AND reporter in (qm:5f539475-12bc-4a9b-8eb4-f93ebc83dedf:536bcc8f-be11-43ee-b6d7-4409f1312d4c) ORDER BY created DESC

queues.name: 🔎 Darktrace AWS Alerts
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND summary ~ "EMIS-Darktrace SaaS::Amazon" AND statusCategory in (2, 4) AND "Purple Testing" = No ORDER BY created DESC

queues.name: Abbie Requests
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND assignee in (63edf8a6d4dc4e35db112e37) AND statusCategory in (2, 4)

queues.name: Abbie Closed Requests
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND assignee in (63edf8a6d4dc4e35db112e37) AND statusCategory = 3

queues.name: CFG Tuning
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND summary ~ Tuning AND status not in (Done, Canceled) ORDER BY "Time to done" ASC

queues.name: KPI Queue
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND created >= -4w

queues.name: KPI Queue - Phishing
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND created >= -4w AND "Request participants" = "phishing@emishealth.com"

queues.name: KPI Queue - Phishing CLOSED
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND created >= -4w AND "Request participants" = "phishing@emishealth.com" AND statusCategory = 3

queues.name: KPI Queue - DarkTrace Breach
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND created >= -4w AND summary ~ "DarkTrace*"

queues.name: KPI Queue - DarkTrace Breach FALSE POS
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND summary ~ "DarkTrace*" AND "Closure code" in ("False-positive - Human error (Internal)", "False-positive - Misconfiguration", "False-positive - System fault") AND created >= -4w

queues.name: KPI Queue - CLOSED
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND "Closure Date" >= -4w

queues.name: CFG Check
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND summary ~ PowerBi AND statusCategory = 4

queues.name: DarkTrace SaaS Instance Alerts
queues.jql: project = INFSOC AND summary ~ "EMIS-Darktrace Active System Status Alert: SaaS" AND statusCategory in (2, 4)

fields_on_create.name: What Date and Estimated time is this required for?

required_fields.name: What Date and Estimated time is this required for?

automation.note: Automation API not accessible — rules must be checked manually in Jira UI
